description: Style NoteWhen you're dressed in pastel hues, finding the right pair of shoes can be quite the challenge. The standard pointy-toed pumps don't quite make the cut. That's why catwalk has come up with this stylish pair for you. Style your ensemble with pretty pastel pops and this sweet pair!Product DetailsCream sandal with forefoot, midfoot and ankle straps with a tang claspSmooth footbed with branding embossed on the heelRubber outsole with a heelMaterial and CarePlastic and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 4"
